search.placeholder: Search realms by name or ID...

modal.title: Create a Realm
modal.subtitle: Deploy your own governance system in minutes

empty.title: No Realms
empty.message: No realms have been registered yet.

tour.globe_body: Realms appear on this 3D map. Click a glowing pin to fly there and open its details.
tour.rail_body: Open the Realms logo (top left) for tour, marketplace, create realm, architecture, and language. Sign in with Internet Identity from the top right.
tour.browse_body: Open the realm browser to search, filter by stage, and scroll the list of registered realms.
tour.panel_body: Search by name or ID, filter by lifecycle stage, sort by users, and pick a realm card to focus it on the map.
tour.assistant_body: Use this tab to open the Realms AI Assistant — your guide to realms, deployments, and governance.
tour.assistant_compose_body: Type a question in the box and press Send, or tap one of the suggested prompts to get started quickly.
tour.stats_body: Realm count, users, locations, stage breakdown, and build version at a glance.
tour.complete_body: That's everything! You're free to explore — spin the globe, browse realms, and ask the assistant anything. Open the Realms menu anytime to replay this tour.

about.title: About Realms
about.body:
You are seeing a map of Governance Operating Systems (GOS, for short).

GOSs are decentralized digital implementations of governance that, as opposed to traditional governments, prevent the opacity that makes corruption and inefficiency of governments possible.
We believe that GOSs will play a paramount role in the development of human civilization.

Join us!

assistant.title: Realms AI Assistant
assistant.empty: Ask me anything about the realms in the registry — which to join, how to create one, or how Realms works.
assistant.timeout: The assistant took too long to respond. Please try again.
assistant.offline: The AI assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
assistant.history_empty: No past conversations yet. Start chatting!
assistant.history_sign_in: Sign in with Internet Identity to save and browse conversation history.
assistant.history_sign_in_save: Sign in to save this conversation to your history.
assistant.default_assistant_desc: Which persona opens when you start a new conversation.
assistant.show_suggestions_desc: Display quick-reply suggestions after each response.
assistant.share_page_context_desc: Send the current page you're viewing as context to the assistant.
